---
title: "Guides"
toc: false
---
::: {.eyebrow}
task-oriented · start here
:::

Practical, sequential walkthroughs. For the *why*, read the
[theory](../theory/index.qmd); for function signatures, the
[reference site](https://traitecoevo.github.io/plant/reference/).

## Getting started

- [Installation](install.qmd)
- [Your first individual](first-individual.qmd) — grow a single plant and read
  its state, rates, and trajectory.

## Running the model

- [Patch dynamics](patch-dynamics.qmd) — grow a patch of competing plants and
  explore the light environment.
- [Strategies & traits](strategies.qmd) — change parameters, build trait
  matrices, and set control accuracy.
- [Extrinsic drivers](extrinsic-drivers.qmd) — drive a run with time-varying
  rainfall or birth rates.
- [Calibration](calibration.qmd)

## Worked examples

- [Example analysis](example-analysis.qmd) — the full pipeline, setup to
  results.
- [Self-thinning](self-thinning.qmd) — recover the classic size–density line.
- [Emergent properties](emergent-properties.qmd) — integrate patch outputs up
  to the metapopulation.
